'''wosagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:raced|raced]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-s-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:raced|raced]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wosagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wosagithi|wosagithi]] || [[word:wosagiji|wosagiji]] || [[word:wosagishi|wosagishi]] || [[word:wosagiki|wosagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wosaguthuthu|wosaguthuthu]] || [[word:wosagujuju|wosagujuju]] || [[word:wosagushushu|wosagushushu]] || [[word:wosagukuku|wosagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wosaguthu|wosaguthu]] || [[word:wosaguju|wosaguju]] || [[word:wosagushu|wosagushu]] || [[word:wosaguku|wosaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wosagufthuf|wosagufthuf]] || [[word:wosagufjuf|wosagufjuf]] || [[word:wosagufshuf|wosagufshuf]] || [[word:wosagufkuf|wosagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wosagethe|wosagethe]] || [[word:wosageje|wosageje]] || [[word:wosageshe|wosageshe]] || [[word:wosageke|wosageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wosagothotho|wosagothotho]] || [[word:wosagojojo|wosagojojo]] || [[word:wosagoshosho|wosagoshosho]] || [[word:wosagokoko|wosagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wosagotho|wosagotho]] || [[word:wosagojo|wosagojo]] || [[word:wosagosho|wosagosho]] || [[word:wosagoko|wosagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wosagofthof|wosagofthof]] || [[word:wosagofjof|wosagofjof]] || [[word:wosagofshof|wosagofshof]] || [[word:wosagofkof|wosagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wosagÃŸfthÃŸf|wosagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wosagÃŸfjÃŸf|wosagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wosagÃŸfshÃŸf|wosagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wosagÃŸfkÃŸf|wosagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wosagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|wosagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wosagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|wosagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wosagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|wosagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wosagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|wosagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wosagÃŸfthÃŸf|wosagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wosagÃŸfjÃŸf|wosagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wosagÃŸfshÃŸf|wosagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wosagÃŸfkÃŸf|wosagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wosagÃŸfthÃŸf|wosagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wosagÃŸfjÃŸf|wosagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wosagÃŸfshÃŸf|wosagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wosagÃŸfkÃŸf|wosagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wosagÃḊthÃḊ|wosagÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:wosagÃḊjÃḊ|wosagÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:wosagÃḊshÃḊ|wosagÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:wosagÃḊkÃḊ|wosagÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wosagathatha|wosagathatha]] || [[word:wosagajaja|wosagajaja]] || [[word:wosagashasha|wosagashasha]] || [[word:wosagakaka|wosagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wosagatha|wosagatha]] || [[word:wosagaja|wosagaja]] || [[word:wosagasha|wosagasha]] || [[word:wosagaka|wosagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wosagafthaf|wosagafthaf]] || [[word:wosagafjaf|wosagafjaf]] || [[word:wosagafshaf|wosagafshaf]] || [[word:wosagafkaf|wosagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wosagasha|wosagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wosagshÃḋsha|wosagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wosagrosha|wosagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wosagmusha|wosagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wosagyasha|wosagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowosagnkshÃḋsha|gowosagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowosagnkrosha|gowosagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowosagnkmusha|gowosagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowosagnkyasha|gowosagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wosasagasha|wosasagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wosasagshÃḋsha|wosasagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wosasagrosha|wosasagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wosasagmusha|wosasagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wosasagyasha|wosasagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowosasagnkshÃḋsha|gowosasagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowosasagnkrosha|gowosasagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowosasagnkmusha|gowosasagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowosasagnkyasha|gowosasagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wesÃḊgasha|wesÃḊgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wesÃḊgshÃḋsha|wesÃḊgshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wesÃḊgrosha|wesÃḊgrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wesÃḊgmusha|wesÃḊgmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wesÃḊgyasha|wesÃḊgyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowesÃḊgnkshÃḋsha|gowesÃḊgnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowesÃḊgnkrosha|gowesÃḊgnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowesÃḊgnkmusha|gowesÃḊgnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowesÃḊgnkyasha|gowesÃḊgnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wosfagasha|wosfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wosfagshÃḋsha|wosfagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wosfagrosha|wosfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wosfagmusha|wosfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wosfagyasha|wosfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowosfagnkshÃḋsha|gowosfagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowosfagnkrosha|gowosfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowosfagnkmusha|gowosfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowosfagnkyasha|gowosfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
